hero.eyebrow: Florida Remote Driving School · West Palm Beach & statewide
hero.title: Online Florida driving courses and license help — in English and Spanish
hero.subtitle: Not sure which course you need? We help you find the right path — first-time license, teen permit, ticket, suspension, 55+ discount, or new to Florida — and connect you to approved providers and bilingual support.

finder.heading: Tell us your situation. We'll point you to the right path.
finder.body: Answer a few quick questions and get a clear recommendation — no guessing course names.

popularCourses.heading: Popular courses & prep
popularCourses.subheading: Regulated courses are delivered through approved providers. Prep products are our own educational materials.

packages.heading: Packages built around your situation
packages.subheading: Bundles that combine the right course path with prep, guidance, and support.

howItWorks.heading: How it works
howItWorks.step1Body: Use the Course Finder or contact us in English or Spanish.
howItWorks.step2Body: We recommend the correct course, prep, and checklist for you.
howItWorks.step3Body: Enroll through an approved provider or grab our prep — with help along the way.

testimonials.heading: Guidance that makes the next step obvious

items.quote: The Course Finder told me exactly which course I needed in about two minutes.
items.name: M. R.

items.quote: Getting help in Spanish over WhatsApp made the whole process so much less stressful.
items.name: J. G.

items.quote: As a parent, the teen guide finally showed me how to actually support my son's practice.
items.name: D. S.

trust.heading: Clear, honest, and local
trust.body: We're an independent, remote-only driving school serving West Palm Beach and all of Florida. We don't claim state approval, and we never promise outcomes we can't control — we just make the process simpler and bilingual.

leadCta.heading: Not sure where to start?
leadCta.body: Send us a quick message and we'll point you to the right next step.
